case_title: SPECK CAB CO DBA: ARROW CAB CO VS PERRICK, JOHN C.

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $921.21 FILED BY SPECK CAB CO DBA: ARROW CAB CO AS TO DEFENDANT PERRICK, JOHN C. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO DEFT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-19-2007 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE PRO TEM, MARK SCHREIBER, CLERK FANNY RAYRAY, NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPECK CAB CO DBA: ARROW CAB CO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PERRICK, JOHN C. THIS MATTER IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE BECAUSE VENUE IS NOT PROPER IN THIS COUNTY. THE ACCIDENT DID NOT OCCUR IN SAN FRANCISCO AND DEFENDANT DOES NOT RESIDE IN SAN FRANCISCO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
